options.label: Software architect
options.description: Software architecture, system structure, interfaces, components, constraints, and trade-offs.

options.label: Embedded software engineer
options.description: Embedded systems, ECUs, real-time constraints, automotive software, low-level behavior, and integration.

options.label: Python software engineer
options.description: Python implementation, modularity, refactoring, scripts, tooling, debugging, and automation.

options.label: Data / ML engineer
options.description: Data pipelines, feature pipelines, ML workflows, training, inference, and evaluation.

options.label: Generative AI expert
options.description: LLMs, RAG, agents, prompt shaping, SuperPrompt design, memory, retrieval, and AI orchestration.

options.label: AWS cloud architect
options.description: AWS services, cloud deployment, IAM, VPC, EC2, S3, Lambda, API Gateway, Bedrock, and cloud architecture.

options.label: DevOps / platform engineer
options.description: CI/CD, infrastructure, containers, deployment, observability, reliability, and platform operations.

options.label: Requirements engineer
options.description: Requirements, specifications, acceptance criteria, traceability, requirement quality, and requirement-code alignment.

options.label: Documentation specialist
options.description: Technical documentation, READMEs, design documents, process descriptions, and structured written artifacts.

options.label: Test automation engineer
options.description: Testing strategy, unit tests, integration tests, regression tests, validation, quality gates, and automation.

options.label: Security and risk advisor
options.description: Security, permissions, risk analysis, privacy, access control, threat mitigation, and safe operation.

options.label: Legal-style advisor
options.description: Legal-style structure, contractual reasoning, obligations, risks, and formal wording without formal legal advice.

options.label: Career coach / recruiter perspective
options.description: Recruiting, CVs, interviews, job applications, salary framing, hiring-manager perspective, and market positioning.

options.label: Product owner
options.description: User value, priorities, backlog, scope, trade-offs, business goals, and product decision-making.

options.label: Technical project manager
options.description: Planning, milestones, estimates, coordination, technical delivery, dependencies, and progress control.

options.label: UX designer for AI tools
options.description: AI-tool UX, user flows, interface clarity, feedback loops, usability, and interaction design.

options.label: Negotiation coach
options.description: Negotiation wording, salary discussion, conflict framing, leverage, and argument structure.

options.label: Financial strategy advisor
options.description: Income, risk, compensation, financial trade-offs, and long-term financial stability.

options.label: Trusted friend
options.description: Personal, direct, loyal, practical, and human conversation mode.

options.label: Inventive problem solver
options.description: Creative solution search, alternative concepts, unconventional approaches, and new angles.
